# Sonar Research: latest AI agent self-improvement techniques 2025

**Model:** perplexity/sonar-pro
**Time:** 2026-03-08T12:01:37.548473+00:00
**Tokens:** 540

---

The latest AI agent self-improvement techniques in 2025 focus on six primary mechanisms that enable systems to optimize their own performance without requiring constant external intervention[1].

## Core Self-Improvement Mechanisms

**Self-reflection and in-loop feedback** represents the simplest approach, where agents improve at inference time without updating model weights[1].

Reflexion, for example, allows language model agents to identify failures, write natural-language critiques of their own attempts, and retry tasks with that feedback—achieving up to 91% pass rates on coding benchmarks like HumanEval, compared to GPT-4 baselines[1].
